question: What is Byte Pair Encoding (BPE)? How does it work for tokenization?
code_hint: BPE iteratively merges most frequent adjacent pairs of bytes/characters
expected_output: BPE merges most frequent adjacent pairs iteratively to build vocabulary from characters/bytes
template:
# BPE (Byte Pair Encoding):
# 1. Start with character-level vocabulary
# 2. Count all adjacent pair frequencies
# 3. Merge most frequent pair into new token
# 4. Repeat until target vocabulary size

print("BPE merges most frequent adjacent pairs iteratively to build vocabulary from characters/bytes")
answer:
# BPE (Byte Pair Encoding):
# 1. Start with character-level vocabulary
# 2. Count all adjacent pair frequencies
# 3. Merge most frequent pair into new token
# 4. Repeat until target vocabulary size

print("BPE merges most frequent adjacent pairs iteratively to build vocabulary from characters/bytes")
